calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER ADRIEL ORTIZ RAMIREZ' REQUEST FOR ORDER RECOGNIZING CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for order recognizing change of gender and sex identifier, change of name and for issuance of new certificates.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Lopes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 10:44:19 a.m., and concluding at 10:53:50 a.m. (D505)

Petitioner Adriel Ortiz Ramirez appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

The Court is unable to grant the request at this time as petitioner would need to satisfy requirements with the court pursuant to California Civil Procedure ("CCP") 1279.5.

Petitioner testifies to be currently on parole and was released last year 2023.

The Clerk provides a copy of the CCP 1279.5 to the petitioner as instructed by the Court.

The Court further informs petitioner to determine the tiers of Penal code will be based on the conviction.

The Court takes the matter off calendar for petitioner to cure issues.
